title: Legal notice
seoDescription: Legal and contact details for Instal Berrozpe S.L. for the informational use of instalberrozpe.com.
intro: This legal notice governs access to and informational use of the instalberrozpe.com website.

sections.heading: Website owner
body: This website is owned by Instal Berrozpe S.L., tax ID B55326813.
Legal and tax address: Antiga 68 bajos de Blanes. Public reference address: Carrer de l'Antiga, 68, 17300 Blanes, Girona, Spain.
Contact and privacy email: david@instalberrozpe.com. Landline: 872 986 161. Mobile and WhatsApp: 676 04 33 89.

sections.heading: Use of the website
body: The website is intended for information and contact regarding Instal Berrozpe services.
Users agree to use the website and its forms lawfully, responsibly and without causing damage to the site or to third parties.
External links, where available, are provided only for reference. Instal Berrozpe does not permanently control third-party content.

sections.heading: Intellectual property and liability
body: Texts, images, logos, design and other website content are protected under applicable law and may not be reused without authorisation where required.
Instal Berrozpe may update website content whenever necessary to keep it accurate and useful.
Continuous availability of the website is not guaranteed, although reasonable measures will be taken to keep it operating correctly.
